title: Netafim India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Netafim India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!
